title: JNVST Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: JNVST Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: JNVST Class 9th Result 2026 on the official website - navodaya.gov.in on 28-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the JNVST 9th Result 2026.

content.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) has officially released the JNVST Class 9 Lateral Entry Selection Test (LEST) Result 2026 for the academic session 2026-2027. The results have been declared for students who appeared for the Class 9 admission entrance examination conducted on 7th February 2026 across various examination centers in the country. JNVST 9th Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - navodaya.gov.in.

Students can check and download their results by visiting the official result portal and entering their roll number and date of birth in the login window. The Samiti has also released the region-wise and district-wise selection list along with the individual scorecards for students who have qualified for admission to Class 9 in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas. Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result including name, roll number, marks obtained, and selection status. In case of any discrepancies or errors in the result, students should immediately contact the concerned Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya or the Regional Office of NVS for clarification and correction.

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has published the latest Class 9 Lateral Entry Selection Test result on its official website for the 2026 academic session, and students can log in to download their provisional results for reference. The results cover the entrance examination conducted on 7th February 2026 for admission to Class 9 in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas across India for the academic year 2026-2027. Students who appeared for the JNVST Class 9 exam can access their marks, selection status, and merit list through the official result portal at navodaya.gov.in using their roll number and date of birth.

rows: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test (JNVST) Class 9
Online scorecard and PDF merit list
Roll Number and Date of Birth

content.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has activated the direct links to check JNVST 9th Result 2026 for Class 9 Lateral Entry Selection Test on its official result portal. Students who appeared for the Class 9 entrance examination can instantly view or download their results and selection list through the direct link provided below using their roll number and date of birth. These direct links help candidates quickly access their marks, selection status, and merit list without navigating multiple pages on the official website.

links.label: JNVST Class 9 Result 2026 - Lateral Entry Selection Test (LEST) 2026

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download their JNVST Class 9 Result 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official website of Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti at navodaya.gov.in
Navigate to the 'Results' or 'Admissions' section on the homepage
Look for the link 'JNVST Class 9 Result 2026' or 'LEST 2026 Result'
Click on the result link to open the login page
Alternatively, you can directly visit the result portal at cbseit.in/cbse/2026/nvsrst/NVS_Cls9.aspx
Enter your Roll Number in the first field
Enter your Date of Birth in DD/MM/YYYY format in the second field
Click on the 'Submit' or 'View Result' button
Your JNVST Class 9 Result 2026 will appear on the screen showing marks obtained and selection status
Check all the details carefully including name, roll number, marks, and whether you are selected
Download and save the scorecard PDF for future reference
Take a printout of the result for document verification and admission process
If selected, check the merit list to find your rank and prepare for document verification
